item.title: Xu Huimin
item.description: Hi, I am a first-year Ph.D. student at Nanyang Technological University, advised by Prof. Luu Anh Tuan. My current research interests primarily focus on Large Language Models (LLMs) and Natural Language Processing, with a particular emphasis on LLMs’ planning and reasoning capabilities. Before joining NTU, I received my master’s (Computer Science, 2020, advised by Prof. Man Lan) degrees from East China Normal University.
